prophecies.a: 剧中2010年的场景里，Lisa的未婚夫用手腕上的设备与人通话，外形酷似智能手表。
prophecies.a_en: In a scene set in 2010, Lisa's fiancé uses a wrist-mounted device to make calls, closely resembling a modern smartwatch.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2015年苹果发布Apple Watch，三星等品牌此前也推出了智能手表。剧中手腕通讯设备的外形和功能与现实中的智能手表高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: Apple released the Apple Watch in 2015, with Samsung and others releasing smartwatches even earlier. The wrist-mounted communication device in the episode closely matches real-world smartwatch design and functionality.

prophecies.a: 同一集中，角色们通过屏幕进行面对面视频通话，类似于FaceTime或Skype。
prophecies.a_en: In the same episode, characters make face-to-face video calls through screens, similar to FaceTime or Skype.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2003年Skype推出视频通话功能，2010年苹果发布FaceTime。虽然视频通话的概念早已存在，但该集准确描绘了它成为日常通讯方式的场景。
prophecies.verdict_en: Skype launched video calling in 2003, and Apple introduced FaceTime in 2010. While video calling concepts existed earlier, the episode accurately depicted it becoming an everyday communication method.

prophecies.a: 剧中一台手持设备上显示的文字被自动「纠正」为错误内容，与现代手机自动纠错功能如出一辙。
prophecies.a_en: A handheld device in the episode auto-'corrects' text to something wrong, eerily similar to modern smartphone autocorrect failures.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2007年iPhone发布后，自动纠错（autocorrect）成为智能手机的标配功能，其频繁出错也成为广泛吐槽的话题。该集在13年前就预见了这一现象。
prophecies.verdict_en: After the iPhone launched in 2007, autocorrect became a standard smartphone feature, and its frequent failures became a widely mocked phenomenon. The episode foresaw this 13 years earlier.

prophecies.a: 在一个闪向未来的剧情中，丽萨成为美国总统，提到她从「特朗普总统」手中接过了一个烂摊子——一个巨大的预算赤字。
prophecies.a_en: In a flash-forward plot, Lisa becomes US president and mentions inheriting 'quite a budget crunch from President Trump' — a massive budget deficit.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2016年11月唐纳德·特朗普当选美国第45任总统，2017年1月就职。该集在16年前就预言了特朗普当选，甚至提到了预算赤字问题。这是辛普森一家最著名的「预言」。
prophecies.verdict_en: Donald Trump was elected the 45th US president in November 2016 and inaugurated in January 2017. The episode predicted this 16 years earlier, even mentioning budget deficit issues. This is The Simpsons' most famous 'prediction'.

prophecies.a: 剧中出现了一个20世纪福克斯的标志，下方写着「迪士尼公司的一个子公司」。
prophecies.q_en: S10E5 'When You Dish Upon a Star' (1998)
prophecies.a_en: The episode shows a 20th Century Fox sign with the subtitle 'A Division of Walt Disney Co.'
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2019年3月20日，华特迪士尼公司以713亿美元正式完成对21世纪福克斯娱乐资产的收购。该集在21年前就预见了这一历史性并购。
prophecies.verdict_en: On March 20, 2019, Walt Disney Company completed its $71.3 billion acquisition of 21st Century Fox entertainment assets. The episode predicted this historic merger 21 years earlier.

prophecies.a: 剧中齐格弗里德和罗伊（Siegfried & Roy）的白虎在表演中攻击了它的训练师。
prophecies.a_en: In the episode, Siegfried & Roy's white tiger attacks its trainer during a performance.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2003年10月3日，拉斯维加斯驯兽师罗伊·霍恩（Roy Horn）在演出中被白虎蒙特科尔攻击并严重受伤。该集在10年前就描绘了几乎相同的场景。
prophecies.verdict_en: On October 3, 2003, Las Vegas performer Roy Horn was attacked and severely injured by white tiger Montecore during a show. The episode depicted a nearly identical scenario 10 years earlier.

prophecies.a: 剧中出现了一台可以像翻书一样使用的平板电脑，用于做笔记和阅读。
prophecies.a_en: The episode features a tablet computer used for note-taking and reading, operated like a book.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2010年苹果发布iPad，开创了现代平板电脑时代。虽然平板电脑概念更早，但该集对其使用场景的描绘与iPad的实际用途高度一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: Apple released the iPad in 2010, launching the modern tablet era. While tablet concepts existed earlier, the episode's depiction of usage scenarios closely matches how iPads are actually used.

prophecies.a: 荷马在黑板上写下了一个数学公式，如果将其中的变量代入，结果非常接近后来实验发现的希格斯玻色子质量。
prophecies.a_en: Homer writes a math equation on a blackboard that, when solved, yields a result remarkably close to the experimentally discovered mass of the Higgs boson.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2012年7月，欧洲核子研究中心（CERN）宣布发现希格斯玻色子，质量约125 GeV。该集编剧之一是物理学背景的大卫·X·科恩。虽然公式并非直接预测希格斯质量，但其巧合引发了广泛讨论。
prophecies.verdict_en: In July 2012, CERN announced the discovery of the Higgs boson with a mass of approximately 125 GeV. One of the episode's writers, David X. Cohen, has a physics background. While the equation wasn't a direct prediction of the Higgs mass, the coincidence sparked widespread discussion.

prophecies.a: 剧中展示了投票机将投给一个候选人的选票自动改成另一个候选人。
prophecies.a_en: The episode shows a voting machine switching a vote cast for one candidate to another candidate automatically.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2012年美国总统大选期间，宾夕法尼亚州等地报告了电子投票机故障，将奥巴马的选票自动切换为罗姆尼。这一事件与剧情高度相似。
prophecies.verdict_en: During the 2012 US presidential election, electronic voting machine malfunctions were reported in Pennsylvania and other states, with Obama votes being switched to Romney. This closely mirrored the episode's plot.

prophecies.a: 剧中Lady Gaga在超级碗中场秀上表演，乘坐空中吊索从天而降。
prophecies.a_en: The episode depicts Lady Gaga performing at a major event, descending from the ceiling on aerial wires.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2017年2月5日，Lady Gaga在超级碗LI中场秀上从NRG体育场屋顶悬挂钢索飞身而下，开场表演与该集剧情惊人相似。
prophecies.verdict_en: On February 5, 2017, Lady Gaga descended from the roof of NRG Stadium on cables during the Super Bowl LI halftime show, eerily similar to the episode's depiction.

prophecies.a: 剧中暗示了希腊经济面临严重危机和债务问题。
prophecies.a_en: The episode references Greece facing severe economic crisis and debt problems.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2015年希腊债务危机全面爆发，希腊成为首个对国际货币基金组织违约的发达国家，并举行了紧急公投。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2015, the Greek debt crisis reached its peak, with Greece becoming the first developed nation to default on the IMF and holding an emergency referendum.

prophecies.a: 剧中一条新闻滚动条显示「诺贝尔奖得主：米尔豪斯·范霍腾」，同年现实中有类似姓名组合的科学家获奖。
prophecies.a_en: A news ticker in the episode displays 'Nobel Prize: Milhouse Van Houten'. In the same year, a scientist with a similar-sounding name won the Nobel Prize.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2016年诺贝尔化学奖授予了本特·费林加（Ben Feringa）等人。虽然名字并非完全匹配，但辛普森一家在预测诺贝尔奖方面的多次巧合引起了关注。实际上该节目的数学顾问本身就有多位与诺奖得主相关联的学者。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 2016 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded to Ben Feringa and others. While names don't exactly match, The Simpsons' multiple coincidences with Nobel Prizes have drawn attention. The show's math consultants include scholars connected to Nobel laureates.

prophecies.a: 剧中出现了一个场景暗示国际足联（FIFA）的腐败问题。
prophecies.q_en: S25E16 'You Don't Have to Live Like a Referee' (2014)
prophecies.a_en: The episode depicts widespread FIFA corruption, with officials accepting bribes.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2015年5月，美国司法部对多名FIFA高级官员提起腐败指控，涉及数千万美元的贿赂和回扣。FIFA丑闻震惊世界体坛。该集在一年前就描绘了FIFA的腐败场景。
prophecies.verdict_en: In May 2015, the US Department of Justice indicted multiple senior FIFA officials on corruption charges involving tens of millions in bribes and kickbacks. The episode depicted FIFA corruption one year before the scandal broke.

prophecies.a: 剧中霍默意外培育出了一种番茄和烟草的杂交植物——「烟草番茄」（Tomacco）。
prophecies.a_en: Homer accidentally grows a tomato-tobacco hybrid plant called 'Tomacco'.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2003年，俄勒冈州农民罗伯·贝尔（Rob Baur）受该集启发，成功将番茄嫁接到烟草根茎上，培育出了真实的「Tomacco」植物。该植物含有尼古丁，与剧中描述一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2003, Oregon farmer Rob Baur, inspired by the episode, successfully grafted a tomato plant onto tobacco roots, creating a real 'Tomacco' plant. The plant contained nicotine, consistent with the show's depiction.

prophecies.a: 剧中出现了一条生活在核电站排水口附近的三眼鱼「眨眨」（Blinky）。
prophecies.a_en: The episode features a three-eyed fish named 'Blinky' living near a nuclear power plant's drainage outlet.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2011年，阿根廷科尔多瓦省一座核电站附近的水库中发现了一条三眼鱼，引发全球媒体轰动。此后福岛核事故附近水域也多次报告变异鱼类。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2011, a three-eyed fish was discovered in a reservoir near a nuclear power plant in Córdoba, Argentina, causing a global media sensation. Mutated fish were also reported near Fukushima after the nuclear disaster.

prophecies.a: 剧中学校食堂被发现使用马肉冒充牛肉制作午餐。
prophecies.a_en: The school cafeteria is caught using horse meat disguised as beef for school lunches.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2013年欧洲爆发大规模马肉丑闻：多个国家的牛肉产品被检测出含有马肉成分，包括英国Tesco等大型超市销售的冷冻汉堡和即食餐。丑闻波及整个欧洲食品供应链。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2013, a major horse meat scandal erupted across Europe: beef products in multiple countries were found to contain horse meat, including frozen burgers and ready meals sold by major retailers like Tesco. The scandal affected the entire European food supply chain.

prophecies.a: 剧中展示了一种类似于FaceTime的视频电话亭，人们可以在公共场所进行视频通话。
prophecies.a_en: The episode shows video phone booths where people can make video calls in public places.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 虽然视频通话的概念早于此集，但2010年代智能手机视频通话（FaceTime、WhatsApp等）真正成为大众日常通讯方式，与该集描绘的场景吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: While video calling concepts predated this episode, smartphone video calling (FaceTime, WhatsApp, etc.) truly became mainstream in the 2010s, matching the episode's depiction.

prophecies.a: 剧中描绘了唐纳德·特朗普乘坐自动扶梯向下的场景，而人群向他投掷物品。
prophecies.a_en: The episode depicts Donald Trump descending an escalator while crowds throw objects at him.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2015年6月16日，特朗普在纽约特朗普大厦乘坐自动扶梯而下，正式宣布参选总统。该集播出时间与特朗普宣布参选仅相隔数周，但制作周期表明创作时已知此事。严格来说这不是远期预言，但再现了标志性的扶梯场景。
prophecies.verdict_en: On June 16, 2015, Trump descended an escalator at Trump Tower to announce his presidential candidacy. The episode aired just weeks later, though production timelines suggest the creators were aware. Strictly speaking not a long-term prediction, but it recreated the iconic escalator scene.
